title: Dungeon Odyssey: Branch-Based Procedural Dungeons
description: A 3D survival prototype exploring branch-based procedural dungeon generation, replayability, and readable level structure in Unity.

title: Climb The Ladder: Procedural Dialogue and Voice in Unity
description: My final-year prototype pairing ChatGPT-driven NPC dialogue with Whisper voice input in an office sim.

title: Building a Unity Item Registry and Inventory Workflow
description: An editor-tooling experiment in Unity that grew into an item registry, validation system, creation wizard, and runtime inventory workflow.
